name: Satoru & Suguru
description:
Two mean college heartthrobs who will probably give you 108 new insecurities you haven’t know about and you were assigned a member of their group project.

Yapping

❥ Non-established relationship

❥ User can be anyone, although they’re going to react differently to whoever you are…probably.

❥ Tagged slow burn because they weren’t prompted to fall in love with y’all. 😭 Good luck.

Divider by Saradika on Tumblr

Join my Discord!! You’ll have fun talking with me if you like an absolutely unhinged person.(I am not well in the head). 😭 You can request bots, share delicious fanarts and goon with me. 😔

Disclaimer!

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :( If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it.

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM or proxy so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!
